SELECT upper(input) FROM test_strings WHERE input IS NOT NULL;
SELECT upper(input) AS uppercase_input FROM test_strings WHERE input LIKE '%house%';
SELECT upper(input) AS uppercase_input FROM test_strings WHERE length(input) > 0;
SELECT upper(sub_input) FROM (SELECT input FROM test_strings) AS subquery;
CREATE TABLE test_data (id UInt32, str String);
SELECT d.id, upper(d.str) AS uppercased FROM test_data d JOIN test_strings s ON d.id = s.input;
SELECT upper(concat(input, ' is here')) FROM test_strings;
SELECT upper(arrayJoin(['one', 'two', 'three'])) AS upper_case_array FROM test_strings;
SELECT upper(toString(number)) FROM (SELECT number FROM system.numbers LIMIT 10);
SELECT COUNT(*), upper(input) FROM test_strings GROUP BY upper(input);
SELECT upper(trim(input)) FROM test_strings WHERE input IS NOT NULL AND input != '';
